meta.title: First S4, Real Connections
meta.description:
First time at S4x25 as a manufacturing security lead.

The Birds of a Feather session wasn’t just discussion—it was shared strategy from peers solving the same problems.

If you're in OT manufacturing and it’s your first S4, that’s where you start.
